patch.value: Coverage to 100%: src/cli command handlers (group A — mutation, history, storage, schema)

Close branch/statement/function gaps to literal 100% for: close, close-many, create, update, update-many, restore, comments, comments-audit, history, history-redact, history-repair, normalize, dedupe-audit, files, get, deps, plan, stats, schema, config, contracts, linked-test-parsers.
